contracts.name: ProjectMemoryEnvelope
contracts.purpose: Groups local project memory records under Page01 identity and boundary rules.

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable deterministic record identifier.

fields.name: project_id
fields.description: Owning project identity inherited from Stage147.

fields.name: record_type
fields.description: Typed memory category.

fields.name: source_stage
fields.description: Stage that produced the source state.

fields.name: source_state_id
fields.description: State binding from Page01 narrative contracts.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy for memory use.

fields.name: boundary_level
fields.description: Node boundary level for projection.

fields.name: created_from
fields.description: Feature-only provenance, not raw manuscript text.

fields.name: checksum
fields.description: Deterministic checksum for reproducibility.

fields.name: write_policy
fields.description: Write policy is disabled by default in Stage150.
